title: ollama/ollama
summary: Official Ollama CLI and server to run Llama 2, Mistral, Gemma, and other LLMs locally with one command.

title: ollama-python
summary: Official Python client library for Ollama; chat, generate, embed, pull, and manage models programmatically.

title: ollama-js
summary: Official JavaScript/TypeScript client for Node.js and browsers; same API surface as the Python client.

title: langchain-ollama
summary: LangChain integration package exposing Ollama models as LLMs and embedders inside LangChain pipelines.

title: ollama-webui
summary: Feature-rich web UI for Ollama (chat interface, model management, multi-user, OpenAI-compat endpoints).

title: ollama4j
summary: Java/Kotlin client for Ollama; sync & async APIs, fluent builder style, Android compatible.

title: ollama-rb
summary: Official Ruby gem for Ollama; idiomatic Ruby wrapper with chat, generate, and embedding methods.

title: ollama-cli (community)
summary: Interactive TUI for Ollama written in Rust; browse, pull, chat, and switch models inside the terminal.

title: ollama-copilot
summary: VS Code extension that replaces GitHub Copilot with a local Ollama model for autocomplete and chat.

title: ollama-haystack
summary: Haystack integration by deepset; use Ollama models as generators or embedders in Haystack pipelines.

title: ollama-discord
summary: Self-hosted Discord bot that brings Ollama models into any server via slash commands and threads.

title: ollama-n8n-node
summary: n8n community node to call Ollama chat/completions inside no-code workflows.

title: ollama-dagger
summary: Dagger module that spins up Ollama as a service in CI pipelines for testing LLM-powered features.

title: ollama-rag
summary: Minimal RAG template using Ollama + Chroma + LangChain; ingest PDFs and query them locally.

title: ollama-helm
summary: Official Helm chart to deploy Ollama on Kubernetes with GPU node selector and PVC for model cache.

title: ollama-spring-boot-starter
summary: Spring Boot autoconfiguration exposing Ollama as a REST client bean and @OllamaTemplate for rapid prototyping.

title: ollama-elixir
summary: Elixir wrapper around Ollama HTTP API with GenServer-backed process pooling for Phoenix apps.

title: ollama-rust-sdk
summary: Community-maintained async Rust crate for Ollama; tokio-based with serde types and streaming support.

title: ollama-csharp
summary: .NET SDK for Ollama; supports .NET 6+ with System.Text.Json and IAsyncEnumerable streaming.

title: ollama-rag-chatbot
summary: Streamlit chatbot that combines Ollama with Weaviate vector store for private RAG conversations.
